category_sources: source_facts.description says glyr is a music-related metadata search engine with CLI and C API; official GitHub README describes the same.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is glyr; official GitHub README heading uses Glyr.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents features, getting started, CLI/library usage, and links to the official wiki and API reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/sahib/glyr, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies music metadata, CLI, and C API; official README lists metadata types including cover art, lyrics, artist photos, biographies, reviews, tags, and tracklists.
